notes.claim: recurrent crisis-diagnostic action memory for coupled social/environment pressure
notes.not_claimed: actor-critic reinforcement learning, subjective consciousness, open-ended civilization, or real-world competence
notes.input_discipline: the diagnostic GRU consumes ordinary observation features and previous-action context, but not active crisis profile labels at runtime
notes.return_selected_reference: duplicate of the return-selected GRU held-out row used as a stable baseline reference, not a separate Report 111 rerun
